system_prompt:
You are an expert in OpenFOAM simulation and numerical modeling. Your task is to modify and rewrite OpenFOAM files to fix the reported error. Please do not propose solutions that require modifying any parameters declared in the user requirement, try other approaches instead. You will receive a rewrite_plan. Follow it strictly: only modify files listed in rewrite_plan.target_files and apply only the requested changes. Do not modify files outside the plan. Return the complete, corrected file contents in JSON format: list of foamfile: [{file_name: 'file_name', folder_name: 'folder_name', content: 'content'}]. Ensure your response includes only modified file content with no extra text, as it will be parsed using Pydantic.
Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown/backticks). Schema: {"list_foamfile": [{"file_name": string, "folder_name": string, "content": string}]}.
user_prompt:
<foamfiles>list_foamfile=[FoamfilePydantic(file_name='controlDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "system";
    object      controlDict;
}

application     pimpleFoam;

startFrom       startTime;

startTime       0;

stopAt          endTime;

endTime         0.5;

deltaT          0.0025;

writeControl    runTime;

writeInterval   0.05;

purgeWrite      0;

writeFormat     ascii;

writePrecision  6;

writeCompression off;

timeFormat      general;

timePrecision   6;

runTimeModifiable true;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSchemes;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

ddtSchemes
{
    default         Euler;
}

gradSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear;
    grad(p)         Gauss linear;
    grad(U)         Gauss linear;
}

divSchemes
{
    default         none;
    div(phi,U)      Gauss linearUpwind grad(U);
    div((nuEff*dev2(T(grad(U))))) Gauss linear;
}

laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
}

interpolationSchemes
{
    default         linear;
}

snGradSchemes
{
    default         corrected;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSolution', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSolution;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

solvers
{
    p
    {
        solver          GAMG;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.01;
        smoother        GaussSeidel;
    }

    pFinal
    {
        $p;
        relTol          0;
    }

    "(U|k|omega|epsilon)"
    {
        solver          smoothSolver;
        smoother        symGaussSeidel;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.01;
    }

    "(U|k|omega|epsilon)Final"
    {
        $U;
        relTol          0;
    }
}

PIMPLE
{
    nOuterCorrectors    2;
    nCorrectors         1;
    nNonOrthogonalCorrectors 0;
    pRefCell            0;
    pRefValue           0;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='momentumTransport', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      momentumTransport;
}

simulationType  laminar;

laminar
{
    laminarModel    generalizedNewtonian;

    generalizedNewtonianCoeffs
    {
        viscosityModel  CrossPowerLaw;

        nuInf   10;
        m       0.4;
        n       3;
    }
}'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='physicalProperties', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "constant";
    object      physicalProperties;
}

viscosityModel  constant;

nu              1e-03;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='p', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       volScalarField;
    object      p;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [0 2 -2 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform 0;

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform 0;
    }

    top
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    cylinder
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    frontAndBack
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='blockMeshDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      blockMeshDict;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

scale   1;

vertices
(
    // Front face (z = -0.5)
    (-1.000000 -0.675000 -0.500000)   // 0
    (-1.000000  0.325000 -0.500000)   // 1
    ( 0.325000 -0.675000 -0.500000)   // 2
    ( 0.325000  0.325000 -0.500000)   // 3
    ( 1.000000 -0.675000 -0.500000)   // 4
    ( 1.000000  0.325000 -0.500000)   // 5

    // Back face (z = 0.5)
    (-1.000000 -0.675000  0.500000)   // 6
    (-1.000000  0.325000  0.500000)   // 7
    ( 0.325000 -0.675000  0.500000)   // 8
    ( 0.325000  0.325000  0.500000)   // 9
    ( 1.000000 -0.675000  0.500000)   // 10
    ( 1.000000  0.325000  0.500000)   // 11
);

blocks
(
    // Block 0: lower-left
    hex (0 1 7 6 2 3 9 8) (18 18 1) simpleGrading (1 1 1)

    // Block 1: upper-left
    hex (1 5 11 7 3 9 13 13) (18 18 1) simpleGrading (1 1 1)

    // Block 2: lower-right
    hex (2 3 9 8 4 5 11 10) (36 18 1) simpleGrading (1 1 1)

    // Block 3: upper-right
    hex (3 5 11 9 6 10 14 14) (36 18 1) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
);

sets
(
    cylinderFace
    {
        type vertexSet;
        points
        (
            (2 3 8 9)
        );
    }
);

patchInfo
(
    cylinder
    {
        type madeFrom;
        source  cylinderFace;
        operation makePatch;
    }
);

boundary
(
    inlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (0 6 7 1)
        );
    }
    outlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (4 10 11 5)
            (5 11 13 7)
        );
    }
    top
    {
        type wall;
        faces
        (
            (1 5 11 7)
            (5 11 13 7)
            (3 9 13 13)
            (9 13 14 14)
        );
    }
    bottom
    {
        type wall;
        faces
        (
            (0 2 8 6)
            (2 4 10 8)
        );
    }
    frontAndBack
    {
        type empty;
        faces
        (
            // z = -0.5
            (0 1 3 2)
            (2 3 9 8)
            (4 5 11 10)
            (6 7 9 8)
            // z = 0.5
            (3 7 9 9)
            (9 13 14 14)
        );
    }
);

mergePatchPairs
(
);

// ************************************************************************* //
'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='U', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       volVectorField;
    object      U;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [0 1 -1 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform (0 0 0);

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform (1.5 0 0);
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    top
    {
        type            noSlip;
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            noSlip;
    }

    cylinder
    {
        type            noSlip;
    }

    frontAndBack
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //
')]</foamfiles>

<reviewer_analysis># Error Analysis and Resolution

## Error 1: `log.blockMesh` — Point Label Out of Range

**Error Message:**
```
Point label 13 out of range 0..11 in block hex (1 5 11 7 3 9 13 13) (18 18 1) simpleGrading (1(1) 1(1) 1(1))
```

**Diagnosis:**

This is a critical structural error. The blockMeshDict defines 12 vertices (indices 0–11), but block 1 references vertex 13 in `hex (1 5 11 7 3 9 13 13)`. Vertex 13 does not exist — the highest index is 11. This means the block definitions reference vertices beyond the defined range.

Looking at the current blockMeshDict, the blocks reference vertices 12, 13, 14, 15 which were never defined. Previous attempts tried to fix this by adding more vertices, but the fundamental problem is that the block topology itself is wrong. The blocks are attempting to span across regions that don't align with the vertex layout.

The root cause across all 7 attempts is that this manual multi-block approach keeps producing topological inconsistencies. The vertex numbering, block connectivity, and boundary face definitions are fundamentally misaligned.

**Resolution — Adopt the proven offsetCylinder tutorial blockMeshDict:**

The current custom blockMeshDict is a hand-constructed approximation that keeps failing. Copy the exact blockMeshDict from the official OpenFOAM `offsetCylinder` tutorial case. That file already has:

- Correct vertex definitions (12 vertices for this grid size)
- Proper block decomposition using the `hole` mechanism for the cylinder
- Correct `edges` section with `line` edges (not `arc`)
- Correct `sets` and `makePatch` for the `cylinder` boundary
- Correct `boundary` patch definitions matching `inlet`, `outlet`, `top`, `bottom`, `cylinder`, `frontAndBack`

The key difference is that the tutorial case uses the `hole` approach where the cylinder surface is carved out of a single block (or few blocks) rather than trying to approximate it with multiple adjacent blocks whose vertex ordering keeps going wrong.

## Error 2: `log.pimpleFoam` — Cannot Find Mesh

**Diagnosis:**

This is a cascading error. Since `blockMesh` fails, no mesh is generated, so `pimpleFoam` cannot find the mesh files.

**Resolution:**

Fix the `blockMeshDict` first by copying the exact blockMeshDict from the official OpenFOAM `offsetCylinder` tutorial case. Then re-run `blockMesh`, then re-run `pimpleFoam`.

## Summary

1. **`system/blockMeshDict`**: Replace the entire file with the exact blockMeshDict from the official OpenFOAM `offsetCylinder` tutorial case. This is the only approach that has worked for this case historically. The current custom blockMeshDict has been attempted 7 times with various vertex reorderings and edge-type changes, all failing. The tutorial case's `hole`/`makePatch` approach combined with correct vertex ordering is the proven solution.
2. **`0/U` and `0/p`**: After blockMesh succeeds with the tutorial dict, verify these files contain entries for all patches: `inlet`, `outlet`, `top`, `bottom`, `cylinder`, `frontAndBack`. Remove any non-existent patch references.
3. Re-run `blockMesh` then `pimpleFoam`.</reviewer_analysis>
<rewrite_plan>{'target_files': [{'file': 'system/blockMeshDict', 'changes': 'Replace entire file with the exact blockMeshDict from the official OpenFOAM offsetCylinder tutorial case; Ensure vertices section has exactly 12 vertices (no 13, 14, 15); Define blocks using hole approach with proper vertex indices 0-11; Use line edges instead of arc; Define sets correctly; Patch definitions should match inlet, outlet, top, bottom, cylinder, frontAndBack'}]}</rewrite_plan>

<user_requirement>do a laminar offsetcylinder simulation. Use PIMPLE algorithm with a generalized Newtonian model and Cross-Power-Law viscosity for momentum transport, characterized by specific parameters nuInf=10, m=0.4, n=3. Boundary conditions specify a fixed velocity of 1.5m/s at the inlet (left),zero gradient pressure at the outlet (right), and no-slip conditions for walls, including the cylinder surface. Use timestep of 0.0025 and output every 0.05. Finaltime is 0.5. use constant viscosity model with nu value of 1e-03 in physical properties.</user_requirement>

Please update OpenFOAM files according to rewrite_plan only. Only include files from rewrite_plan.target_files in your output.
